case_title: RATTO, WYNEMA VS JOHNSON, JULIA AKA BRENNAN, JULI JOY IND. & DBA et al

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FILED ORDER SENT TO COMMISSER FOR SIGNATURE. $10 FEE PAID.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-01-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-22-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER DEFENDANT REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATTO, WYNEMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JULIA AKA BRENNAN, JULI JOY IND. & DBA JJ INTERIORS $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO JUDGEMENT CREDITOR JULIA JOHNSON - JUDGEMENT PAID THROUGH THE COURT - RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO FORWARDING AD
FUNDS REFERRED TO IN ESCHEATMENT NOTICE HAVE BEEN ESCHEATED TO THE COURT'S OPERATION FUND - EFFECTIVE APRIL 23, 2013

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHNSON, JULIA AKA BRENNAN, JULI JOY IND. & DBA JJ INTERIORS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT RATTO, WYNEMA $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00, JULIA JOHNSON TO PROVIDE WYNEMA, RATTO THE ITEMS WHICH RATTO ORDERED: BEDSPREAD AND PILLOW SHAMS; 1 CANDELABRA; FRINGE FOR SOFA PILLOWS; FABRIC FOR DINING ROOM CHAIR; AND FABRIC FOR 2 GAME TABLE CHAIRS. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
